corrections.location: Dan. X 16, first line of verse 16
corrections.note: Transcript has ἤνοιξα? Wait body actually reads ἤνοιξα in image; no correction needed.
Acute on η is visible in the image.
The stray i before chapter heading is not in the image; there is punctuation before the chapter numeral.
Accent appears on θέ in the image.
No correction here; included by mistake.
Two separate Greek numeral/sigla markers are printed with spacing.
Use Greek numeral prime form as printed.
Apparatus in image is mostly unaccented Greek; this may not be appropriate.

uncertain.note: There may be a punctuation mark before the chapter heading ΧΙ after μοι; exact character could be middle dot or raised point.
The bracketed Latin note after 'υγιαινε' is small; 'post al ras ali q 87vid' seems likely, but exact spacing/abbreviation is hard to read.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly matches, but there is a stray 'ι' before chapter heading ΧΙ and at least one accent difference. Apparatus largely matches; one siglum note is mistranscribed. Removed non-errors should be ignored if mechanically possible.
